qText: In a family, the combined age of husband, wife and a son is 90 years. The husband is the oldest. The difference in 1 the ages of the husband and wife is rd 3 the age of their son. After 10 years, the age of the son would be half the age of his father. What is the present age of his mother (in years) ?

P got married 15 years ago. Today 3 her age is 1 times her age at the time 5 of her marriage. At present her son's age 1 is of her age. What was her son's age 5 4 years ago as a fraction of P's age at that time? 1 1 5 1
Five years ago, the ratio of the ages of Tarun and Saurabh was 4 : 1. After five years, the ratio of their ages will be 2 : 1. What is the present age of Saurabh (in years)?

Seven years from now, Anamika will be as old as Malini was 4 years ago. Srinidhi was born 2 years ago. The average age of Anamika, Malini and Srinidhi 10 years from now will be 33 years. What is the present age of Anamika ?

The present age of a father is three times that of his elder son. Four years hence, the age of the father will be four times that of his younger son. If the difference between the present ages of the elder and younger child is 6 years, what is the present age of the father ?

Gautam’s present age is equal to 20% of his father's age 15 years ago, and Gaurav's (brother of Gautam) present age is 60% of his father’s age 10 years ago. If the sum of Gautam’s present age and Gaurav’s present age is 31, then find their father’s present age.
Rahul is three times as old as Amar. Three years ago Amber was half the age of Rahul. After four years from now, Rahul will be 43. What are the present ages of Amar and Amber ?
The total age of Amit and Suvarna on 1 January 2015 is 61 years. Amit is three years younger than Suvarna. What was the age of Suvarna on 1 January 2010 ?
The present ages (in years) of A and B are in the ratio of 3 : 4. Five years back, the ratio of their ages was 2 : 3. What is the present age (in years) of A ?

Three years ago, the age of a person was six times the age of his younger brother. Eight years later, the age of the person will be three years less than twice the age of his younger brother. Find the present ages of the person and his younger brother.
10 years ago, the age of Sunita was thrice the age of her daughter Tanya. 10 years hence, the age of Sunita will be twice the age of Tanya. What is the ratio of their present ages ?

The ratio of the ages of A and B, 3 years ago, was 5 : 7. The ratio of their ages, 13 years from now, will be 9 : 11. If the present age of C is 11 years less than that of B, then the present age of C, in years, is:
Amit’s father is aged five times more than Amit. After 6 years, he would be three and a half times of Amit’s age. After further 9 years, how many times of Amit’s age would he be ? 3 1
Ghanshyam is thrice as old as Akash. 10 years ago, Ghanshyam was four times as old as Akash. What is the difference between their current ages (in years) ?
One year ago, the age of B was twice that of A. After 9 years, if the ratio of the ages of B and A would be 4 ∶ 3, then the sum of their present ages is _____ years.
Nihira is 25 years old and Punith is 30 years old. How many years ago was the ratio of their ages 3 : 4 ?

There are 12 workers in an office and the average age of all the workers is 1 35 years. A new worker joins the 2 office, the average becomes 37 years. The current age of the newly joined worker is: 1 1
The ratio of a father’s age to his son’s age is 7 : 4. The product of the numbers representing their ages is 1372. The ratio of their ages after 8 years will be:
10 years ago, a man’s age was 5 times of his son’s age. 2 years hence, twice his age will be equal to 4 times the age of his son. What is the present age (in years) of the son ?

The age of a father will be double the age of his son ten years later. 10 years ago, the father’s age was six times the age of the son. How many years from now, the ratio of their ages will be 3 : 2 ?
The average age of 24 workers and their supervisor is 41 years. If the supervisor's age is excluded, the average reduces by 0.75 years. The age of the supervisor is:
Ram is 20 years older than Rahul. ‘n’ years ago Ram was thrice as old as Rahul. ‘2n’ years from now the ratio of the ages of Ram and Rahul will be 15 : 11. What is the value of ‘n’ ?
Four years ago, Ravi was four times as old as Kavya. Seven years from now, Ravi will be three times as old as Kavya. Find the sum of their present ages.
The sum of the present ages of a father and son is 50 years. If after 5 years, the father’s age will be 5 times the age of the son, then what was the father’s age 5 years ago ?
The age of the father 10 years ago was thrice the age of his son. Ten years hence, the father's age will be twice that of his son. What is the ratio of their present ages?
The sum of the ages of a son and father is 52 years; after four years the age of the father will be four times that of the son. What is the present age ( in years) of the son?
The average age of A, B and C is 20 years. Two years ago the sum of the ages of A and B was 6 more than that of C. Find the present age of C.
Three boys, on an average, are 25 years old, and their age are in the ratio of 3 : 5 : 7. What is the age of youngest boy' ?
The present age of Rahim is five times the present age of his daughter, Savita. Seven years from now, Rahim will be three times as old as Savita. What is the present age (in years) of Rahim?
Meenu is 38 years old. Her daughter is 8 years old. In how many years will Meenu be double her daughter's age?

Mother told her daughter, "Seven years ago, I was seven times as old as you were then. Also, three years from now, I shall be three times as old as you will be". Find the present ages of the mother and the daughter, respectively.
At present, Ritika's age is 3 times the age of Vipul. After 7 years, Ritika will be 2 times as old as Vipul. What is the present age of Ritika (in years)?

The present age of a husband and wife is in the ratio 5: 4. After 6 years their ages will be in the ratio 6: 5. At the time of their marriage the ratio of their ages was 4: 3. In how many years ago they were married?
The sum of the ages of Arun and Bharti is 24 years such that Arun is older. If the age of Arun and Bharti is doubled,the difference is 8 years. What is the age of Arun, in years?
The ratio of Mohit's and Sunil's present age is 4 : 5. Mohit is 7 years younger than Sunil. What will be the ratio of Mohit's age to Sunil's age after 7 years?
The ratio of the present ages of Charvi and Vaishnavi is 4 : 5. Yuvika is 2 years older than Charvi but 5 years younger than Vaishnavi. Find the present age of Vaishnavi.

Three years ago, the difference between the age of Ravish and the age of Kailash was 18 years. Three years from today, Ravish will be three times as old as Kailash. What is the present age of Ravish (in years) ?

The present age of Ramesh is 7 years more than the present age of his wife Sangeeta. 6 years hence, the age of Ramesh will be three times that of his son Mayank. If the present age of Mayank is 10 years, then what is the present age of Sangeeta ?

Alekhya was born one year after her mother’s marriage. Her father is two years elder than her mother but twenty five years older than Alekhya, who is six years old. At what age did the mother get married ?
Vijay is 8 years younger than Amit. The sum of the current ages of Vijay and Amit is 42 years. What is the current age of Vijay ?
A father’s age at the time of the birth of his son is the same as the present age of the son. If the age of the son was 15 years five years ago, then what is the current age of the father ?
The sum of Vishal and Aditi’s current ages is 105 years. If Aditi is 25 years younger than Vishal, then what is the current age of Pritam who is 7 years older than Aditi ?
Aarav's mother was 3 times as old as Aarav 5 years ago. After 5 years she will be twice as old as Aarav. How old is Aarav today ?
Arun is celebrating his birthday today. On his next birthday, he will be twice his age that was 12 years ago. How old is Arun today ?
